vocab.meaning: phần thiết yếu, không thể thiếu
vocab.example: Bringing my smartphone is part and parcel of my daily routine whenever I step out.

vocab.meaning: chịu đựng gánh nặng/áp lực chính
vocab.example: My sturdy backpack usually bears the brunt of my heavy laptop and textbooks.

vocab.meaning: vật bảo hộ, phương án dự phòng
vocab.example: I always carry a portable charger as a safety net in case my phone battery dies unexpectedly.

vocab.meaning: luôn sẵn sàng khi cần (nghĩa bóng: luôn có sẵn)
vocab.example: With my Kindle in my bag, I have an entire library at my beck and call during long commutes.

vocab.meaning: gây ấn tượng bằng vẻ ngoài/phụ kiện
vocab.example: I often wear a stylish watch to cut a dash when attending formal social gatherings.
I keep a weather eye on my belongings, especially my wallet, when I'm in crowded places.

vocab.meaning: những đồ vật cần thiết cho công việc/hoạt động
vocab.example: As a photographer, my camera and lenses are the essential tools of the trade that I never leave behind.

vocab.meaning: những thứ linh tinh, vụn vặt
vocab.example: My pockets are usually cluttered with various odds and ends like receipts and loose change.

vocab.word: in the palm of one's hand
vocab.meaning: nằm trong lòng bàn tay (sự kiểm soát/tiện lợi)
vocab.example: Having a smartphone means I have the world's information right in the palm of my hand.
I always tuck a small umbrella into my bag because it often comes in handy with this erratic weather.
